item.title: About
item.description: Hi! My name is Maud, and I’m looking for a new challenge as a data scientist. I previously worked as a post-doctoral researcher in the field of experimental psychology, with a focus on mental well-being and decision-making. I have always been a very curious person. This is what originally led me to science and is why I am passionate about travelling and exploring different cultures and cuisines. I particularly enjoy using data analysis, modelling and data visualization to translate complex questions into understandable insights.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Here you find a sample of personal data projects. Stay tuned for more to come!

item.title: CV
item.description: I am a research-trained, client-centric professional with 10 years of experience in psychological research, in the areas of mental health, wellbeing and decision-making. I am data- and impact-driven. I like to work in a dynamic and socially responsible environment where my work has a direct positive impact. Skills and Competencies Data analytics — Software and programming skills for data collection (e.g. Qualtrics, LimeSurvey, Python), data analysis, machine learning and visualization (e.

item.title: publications
item.description: You can also find me on Google Scholar and ResearchGate. My ORCID ID is 0000-0001-9933-4569. Peer-reviewed Publications 2023 Van Beveren, M-L., Braet, J., De Raedt, R., Grol, M., Wante, L., & Braet, C. (2023). Always look on the bright side of life: Individual differences in visual attentional breadth for understanding temperament and emotion regulation in adolescents. Frontiers in Psychology. 2021 Grol, M., Cásedas, L., Oomen, D., Spronk, D.

I’m Maud, a data scientist based in Berlin. My academic background is in experimental psychology, working with real-world datasets and using advanced statistical methods. I love analyzing, modeling and visualizing data to make better and informed decisions. Learn more about me

item.title: Analyse
item.description: I am experienced in analyzing data and clearly presenting results in reproducible reports. I mainly use R and Python for all data-related tasks, including machine learning methods and natural language processing.

item.title: Collect
item.description: I have extensive experience with data collection methods such as survey design, A/B testing and semi-structured interviews. I have worked with a.o. Qualtrics, LimeSurvey and Python to collect and process data.

item.title: Visualize
item.description: Visually presenting data helps to provide a quick and clear understanding of the information I have mostly used open source tools R/shiny to create static infographics and interactive dashboards.
